description: Camera path type contract -- TypeScript interface for camera path presets. Defines CameraPathPreset with evaluate(t, params) => CameraFrameState, CameraParams (speed/easing/offset), OversizeRequirements, CameraPathRegistry with lookup functions, resolveCameraParams() helper, toCameraState() bridge to OBJ-003 CameraState, and validateCameraPathPreset/validateCameraParams validation utilities. Per Section 4.3.
notes: Tier 1 contract. Speed scales spatial amplitude (not temporal rate). Offset applied outside evaluate() by renderer. CameraFrameState is path-controlled subset of OBJ-003 CameraState. Registry parameterized for testability. Isomorphic module (Node.js + browser). 36 acceptance criteria. Provisional geometry names from seed Section 4.2 until OBJ-005 finalizes.
